title: Pure Direct OpenAI Mini | Prompt Only
description: Single-call OpenAI mini baseline where answer generation receives only objective, constraints, session context, and the direct harness. The judge may still use memory for compliance scoring.

summarizerHarness.instruction: Treat this as a live MSP severity-1 incident. Keep the answer prompt-only and memory-free. Stay bounded enough for reliable judging: use concise sections or bullets, avoid exhaustive templates, and focus on the first-hour actions, decision gates, tenant boundaries, evidence preservation, incident records, and communication safety.
